cities.name: Sydney, Australia
cities.description: A spectacular coastal city housing the iconic Sydney Opera House and pristine structural bay views.

cities.name: Melbourne, Australia
cities.description: The cultural capital of Australia, famous for its winding graffiti alleyways and exceptional coffee.

cities.name: Tokyo, Japan
cities.description: A neo-futuristic metropolis where towering neon skyscrapers blend beautifully alongside timeless local shrines.

cities.name: Kyoto, Japan
cities.description: The heart of imperial Japan, renowned for historic wooden temples and manicured rock gardens.

temples.name: Angkor Wat, Cambodia
temples.description: A massive architectural complex displaying beautiful historical remnants of traditional Southeast Asian temples.

temples.name: Kinkaku-ji, Japan
temples.description: The Zen Buddhist Golden Pavilion standing prominently above tranquil reflective waters in Kyoto.

beaches.name: Bora Bora, French Polynesia
beaches.description: Indulge in crystal clear turquoise lagoons and signature luxury overwater bungalow escapes.

beaches.name: Copacabana, Brazil
beaches.description: A lively, world-famous high-energy beach stretching continuously alongside vibrant Rio de Janeiro.
